Appearances:
Plaintiff CSV Hospitality Management is present. Represented by Saba Burton.
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alan del Rosario is present.
Attorney Jason Yee appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of October 17, 2016 is vacated. (501/jpt)
